QF.id: VI Functions of DP Account Operations_15

question.text: SMS alerts for NSDL/CDSL demat accounts are sent for all of the following EXCEPT:

answer.text: IPO credits, subdivision, and bonus credits
Registration and de-registration of Power of Attorney

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SMS alerts cover: debit transfers, IPO/subdivision/bonus credits, failed instructions, overdue instructions, mobile/address changes, MF unit debits, pledge invocations, PoA changes, nominee changes, etc. AMC deductions are not in the listed alert types. **The Trap:** 'PoA registration/de-registration' IS an alert type — this is specifically listed as one of the SMS alert categories. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VII covers alert mechanisms for settlement-related events. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** NSDL/CDSL does not charge DPs for the SMS alert facility. For accounts operated by PoA, SMS alerts cannot be disabled — a security measure to protect the account holder.
